description: CompositionMulti-coloured top made of 100% viscose, has raglan sleeves with a flowing hem, made of a single cut attached at the back and front, and has sequin and thread detailing along the V-necklineFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Do not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printEthnic fused with oodles of attitude results in this stylish top from jealous 21. The off-beat handkerchief cut camouflages that unwanted fat and reflects a slim and toned look. Pair this with slim Fit denims and heels for a complete fashionable look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
